capabilities.name: Registration
capabilities.verify: register_webinar skill (rpc:register_for_webinar, scope external); registrations view in WebinarsPage

capabilities.name: Reminder emails
capabilities.verify: reminder_confirm/t24/t1/post_sent_at columns + webinar.reminder.* event emission in baseline migration
capabilities.notes: DELIVERY BUILT 2026-07-05 (was 'in schema, not wired': webinar_reminder_tick existed but nothing called it and nothing turned its events into emails). New send-webinar-reminders edge function sweeps the same four windows (confirm / T-24h / T-1h / post), emails via email-send, and stamps the per-registration markers; 'Webinar Reminders' cron automation (every 15 min, agent_automations via migration 20260705160000) drives it through automation-dispatcher; send_webinar_reminders skill registered (module seed + migration). Tick remains as the event-emitting alternative — both dedupe on the same markers. Stays partial pending deploy + a Stage-3 live sweep run.

capabilities.name: Attendance tracking

capabilities.name: Recording links
capabilities.verify: complete_webinar skill accepts p_recording_url; recording shown in WebinarsPage

capabilities.name: Follow-up emails
capabilities.verify: follow_up_sent flag rendered as badge in WebinarsPage (line 583)
capabilities.notes: DELIVERY BUILT 2026-07-05: the post-webinar email in send-webinar-reminders IS the follow-up (thanks vs missed_you variant by attended, recording link when set) and it stamps webinar_registrations.follow_up_sent=true alongside the dedupe marker — the flag the WebinarsPage badge renders. Stays partial pending deploy + live run.
